source_of_truth.path: /Users/caolei/Desktop/Obsidian_root/011_项目经验/互联网+/lingobridge/Records&Drafts/03-02-LingoBridge MVP PRD v2.0.md

project.name: LingoBridge
project.positioning: 哈萨克斯坦留学生的中文学习工具网站，跟着老师PPT走，课后能练发音。

current_state.backend: Express MVP API scaffold implemented with local JSON metadata and local file storage
current_state.deployment: Vercel prototype only; Tencent Cloud public test pending
critical_mock_surfaces: PPTX/PDF page extraction uses fallback-generated pages
TTS provider uses browser fallback when cloud credentials are absent
Dashboards and reports remain visual mocks

implementation_status.summary: First MVP vertical slice implemented: backend scaffold, API client, demo login, teacher course upload, student course practice/TTS/recording loop, teacher replay upload, schedule replay loading, and E2E delegation prompt.
open_items: Verify camera/mic/screen indicator cleanup in a real browser
Replace fallback PPTX/PDF/Excel handling with real parsers/converters when demo time allows
Add real object storage and cloud TTS providers after MVP path is stable

okrts.objective: Make the PRD v2.0 MVP demonstrable by 2026-05-15: teacher courseware upload, student course practice, TTS, recording storage/management, teacher replay, and Tencent Cloud public test.

key_results.name: MVP core learning loop works
key_results.acceptance: PPT/PDF upload -> course page -> TTS -> student record -> upload -> play/delete/download.

key_results.name: Teacher courseware upload works
key_results.acceptance: Teacher can upload .pptx, .pdf, .xlsx; .pptx/.pdf become course pages; .xlsx syncs as practice/homework data.

key_results.name: Student practice page works
key_results.acceptance: Course pages support navigation, Chinese TTS, recording, and own recording list.

key_results.name: Recording storage is real
key_results.acceptance: Audio is uploaded to backend/storage abstraction and linked to student/course/page.

key_results.name: Teacher recording and replay works
key_results.acceptance: Teacher screen/camera recording is saved; students can find replay by date in schedule/history.

key_results.name: Live mode demo works
key_results.acceptance: Teacher can choose local screen share mode or uploaded/existing PDF mode with PDF page and canvas drawing.

key_results.name: Camera and microphone permission bug is fixed
key_results.acceptance: Toggling off or exiting stops all media tracks and browser camera indicator closes.

key_results.name: Three-language UI remains usable
key_results.acceptance: Chinese/Russian/Kazakh switching works on demo-critical pages.

key_results.name: Tencent Cloud public test works
key_results.acceptance: Public frontend opens and /api/v1/health returns OK.

risks.risk: Scope expands into full LMS or SaaS.
risks.control: Use PRD v2.0 as source of truth; do not implement out-of-scope roadmap features.
Convert PPTX to PDF/pages or require PDF fallback for MVP demo.

risks.risk: Browser camera/mic remains active after UI toggle.
risks.control: Stop all MediaStream tracks on toggle off, exit, unmount, and recording stop.

risks.risk: Plaintext secrets exist in local documentation.
risks.control: Rotate exposed keys, never commit secrets, use .env and .gitignore.

risks.risk: Direct IP public deployment lacks HTTPS.
risks.control: Accept only for MVP test; production needs domain and HTTPS.

signals: Manual teacher-student MVP path can be recorded end to end

in.name: PPT/PDF import
in.description: Upload PPT/PDF, parse or convert to course pages, support page browsing.

in.name: Course-practice sync
in.description: Associate PPT/page content with practice items; Excel can create preview/homework rows linked to course/page.

in.name: Chinese TTS
in.description: Course page button triggers TTS API; browser TTS fallback allowed when provider is missing.

in.name: Recording storage
in.description: Upload audio to storage and link metadata to student/course/page.

in.name: Recording management
in.description: Student can play, delete, and download own recordings.

in.name: Replay
in.description: Teacher recording is saved and students can replay by date in schedule/history.

in.name: Teacher live modes
in.description: Local screen share mode and PDF mode with paging/canvas drawing/camera.

entities: user(id, username, password_hash, role, display_name, language_pref, created_at)
course_page(id, course_id, page_number, content_html, audio_text, image_url)
exercise(id, course_id, page_number, prompt, answer, source_file_id, created_at)
recording(id, student_id, course_id, page_number, audio_url, duration_sec, created_at)
lecture_recording(id, course_id, teacher_id, video_url, duration_sec, created_at)
file_metadata(id, owner_id, course_id, type, filename, mime_type, size_bytes, storage_url, created_at)

storage.course_pages: object storage or local upload directory for MVP
storage.metadata: PostgreSQL preferred; SQLite/local JSON acceptable only as emergency demo fallback

tasks.title: Secret hygiene and PRD guardrails
acceptance: No real API key/token in git diff
README or deployment notes state PRD v2.0 is source of truth
tasks.agent_prompt: Audit the repository and planned changes for secrets and scope creep. Use PRD v2.0 as source of truth. Add or verify .gitignore entries for .env files and uploaded media. Do not print or commit secret values.
tasks.progress_note: Completed in light refactor: .env and media/storage outputs are ignored; PRD v2.0 guardrails added to .agent rules and README/Agent docs.

tasks.title: Create single-tenant MVP backend skeleton
tasks.agent_prompt: Implement a minimal Node.js Express or Fastify backend for the single-tenant CZU MVP. Add health, demo auth, current user, config, response envelope, and error handling. Do not implement multi-tenant SaaS.
tasks.progress_note: Implemented Express API with health, demo auth, current user, response envelope, local JSON DB, and local file storage.

tasks.title: Courseware upload and course page generation
acceptance: PDF is displayable as course pages
PPTX has conversion or explicit PDF fallback
Excel rows create exercise records linked to course/page
tasks.agent_prompt: Implement course/courseware APIs from PRD v2.0. Support teacher upload of pptx/pdf/xlsx. Generate course pages for PDF/PPTX fallback and parse Excel into practice items. Keep online PPT editing out of scope.
tasks.progress_note: API accepts pptx/pdf/xlsx and enforces type/size. PDF/PPTX and Excel currently generate MVP fallback pages/exercises instead of true parsing.

tasks.title: TTS and student recording APIs
tasks.agent_prompt: Implement the student practice backend loop: TTS facade and recording upload/list/delete/download metadata. Use env-based provider config; do not hardcode Tencent secrets.
tasks.progress_note: Recording upload/list/delete/play URL implemented. TTS facade implemented with browser fallback metadata; real Tencent TTS provider not configured yet.

tasks.title: Teacher lecture replay APIs
tasks.agent_prompt: Implement teacher lecture replay upload/list/delete. Store video through the same storage abstraction and link it to course/teacher/date.
tasks.progress_note: Lecture upload/list/delete implemented through same local storage abstraction.

tasks.title: API client and demo login
acceptance: Teacher/student route selection uses returned role
API errors show a user-friendly message
tasks.agent_prompt: Create API client/services and replace simulated LoginView behavior with backend demo login. Preserve current visual design.
tasks.progress_note: Added src/services/apiClient.ts and wired LoginView to backend demo auth.

tasks.title: Teacher courseware upload UI
acceptance: Upload result appears in course page/practice data
tasks.agent_prompt: Wire TeacherCoursesView to real course/courseware APIs. Add upload controls for pptx/pdf/xlsx. Keep non-core dashboards mock if needed.
tasks.progress_note: TeacherCoursesView now loads courses, creates courses, and uploads pptx/pdf/xlsx through the API.

tasks.title: Student course practice, TTS, and recording management
acceptance: StudentClassroomView renders course pages from API
TTS calls backend facade with browser fallback
Excel-derived exercises are visible in practice/homework context
tasks.agent_prompt: Replace mock-only student practice behavior with API-backed course pages, TTS, recording management, and Excel-derived exercise display. Preserve UI style and mobile/iPad adaptability.
tasks.progress_note: StudentClassroomView now renders API course pages, uses backend TTS facade with browser fallback, and supports recording upload/list/play/download/delete.

tasks.title: Teacher live modes and permission lifecycle fix
acceptance: Camera toggle off stops video tracks
Mic toggle off stops audio tracks
Screen share stop stops display tracks
Teacher can choose local screen share or PDF mode
PDF mode supports page changes and canvas drawing
Teacher recording uploads replay to backend
tasks.agent_prompt: Fix TeacherClassroomView media lifecycle. Centralize track cleanup and call it on toggle off, exit, unmount, and recording stop. Wire lecture recording upload and keep local/PDF live modes demo-ready.
tasks.progress_note: Media cleanup and lecture upload are wired in code. Real browser verification of camera/mic/screen indicators is still required.

tasks.title: Schedule/history replay UI
acceptance: ScheduleView loads lecture replays from API
Student can choose date and play historical video
Empty state is clear when no replay exists
tasks.agent_prompt: Wire ScheduleView history/replay section to lecture APIs so students can replay videos by date, as required by PRD v2.0.
tasks.progress_note: ScheduleView replays tab now reads lecture data from backend and opens replay URLs.

tasks.title: Tencent Cloud public test deployment
acceptance: Deployment env example exists without real secrets
Nginx or equivalent serves frontend and proxies /api
Upload body limit supports courseware/replay MVP
tasks.agent_prompt: Create minimal deployment assets and checklist for Tencent Cloud IP-based MVP test. Prefer Docker Compose; PM2 fallback is acceptable. Never include real secrets.
tasks.progress_note: Dockerfile, docker-compose.yml, nginx.conf, PM2 ecosystem.cjs, deploy/seed/healthcheck scripts created and locally reviewed. Actual Tencent Cloud VM deploy and public health verification are still pending.

tasks.title: MVP acceptance audit against PRD v2.0
acceptance: A7 public access checked or clearly risk-noted
tasks.agent_prompt: Run a code and manual-flow audit against PRD v2.0 only. Report pass/fail for A1-A7 plus the explicit media permission bug. Block if the core loop is still mock-only.
tasks.progress_note: Acceptance report created at tests/acceptance/mvp-acceptance-report.md. Unit/type/build/backend smoke checks pass. Browser E2E, media permission indicator verification, and Tencent Cloud public URL verification remain pending.

audit_gates: PRD v2.0 remains source of truth
No out-of-scope LMS/SaaS/social/payment/AI-scoring implementation is required for MVP
Student can use TTS and manage recordings
Teacher replay can be uploaded and viewed by students
Camera/mic/screen tracks stop after toggle off and exit
Tencent Cloud public health check passes before demo
manual_demo_path: Student uploads, plays, downloads, and deletes recording
Teacher starts local screen share mode
Teacher switches to PDF mode and draws on canvas
Teacher toggles camera off and confirms browser indicator closes
Student finds replay in schedule/history by date
Public Tencent Cloud URL and health endpoint are verified
